title: Big Ideas 2026: The consumer gold rush
body: Source: Big Ideas 2026 article
Topic: Consumer tech distribution breakthrough in 2026

title: Agenda: Major Themes
body: New distribution infrastructure for consumer developers
Access to massive user audiences
Emergence of mini-app networks
Once-in-a-decade consumer tech opportunity
Deployed sensor infrastructure for civic applications

title: OpenAI Apps SDK Release
body: OpenAI has recently released the Apps SDK
This SDK enables consumer developers to build applications
The release represents a key infrastructure piece for the consumer product cycle

title: Apple Mini-Apps Support
body: Apple now supports mini-apps on its platform
This support creates new development opportunities for consumer developers
Apple's entry adds major platform backing to the mini-app ecosystem

title: ChatGPT Group Messaging
body: ChatGPT has rolled out group messaging functionality
This feature expands ChatGPT's use cases beyond individual interactions
Group messaging adds a social layer to the AI platform

title: ChatGPT's 900M User Audience
body: ChatGPT has 900M users
Consumer developers can now tap this user audience directly
This represents unprecedented immediate access to a massive user base

title: Wabi Mini-App Network
body: Wabi represents new networks of mini-apps emerging in the market
Developers can grow with these mini-app networks
Wabi is part of the expanding mini-app ecosystem alongside major platforms

title: Distribution Channel Completion
body: These developments represent the final piece in the consumer product cycle
The new distribution channel completes the infrastructure needed for consumer apps
This marks a structural shift in how consumer products can reach users

title: Once-in-a-Decade Gold Rush
body: This new distribution channel is set to kick off a once-in-a-decade gold rush
The gold rush in consumer tech is expected to occur in 2026
The opportunity is characterized as a rare, generational shift in the industry

title: Billion+ Deployed Sensors
body: More than a billion networked cameras and sensors are already deployed
These sensors are deployed across U.S. cities
The infrastructure is already in place and operational

title: Civic Applications
body: The deployed sensor network is feeding new civic applications
These applications leverage the existing billion+ sensor infrastructure
Civic use cases represent a key application area for the deployed technology

title: Safety Applications
body: The sensor network is feeding new safety applications
Safety applications utilize the more than a billion deployed cameras and sensors
This represents a parallel track to civic applications in utilizing deployed infrastructure

title: 2026 Outlook
body: Consumer developers gain direct access to 900M ChatGPT users and new mini-app networks
The final distribution piece completes the consumer product cycle
A once-in-a-decade gold rush in consumer tech is set to begin
Over a billion deployed sensors across U.S. cities enable new civic and safety applications
